text: >> Hello. >> Who is this? >> Good evening. This is Cassie speaking. So, I'm calling because your Medicare member profile hasn't been transferred into Medicare's national database for 2026 yet. And that can hold up your coverage approvals. >> So, you do have both Part A and Part B, right? >> Yes, I do. >> You do qualify forwarding you to our supervisor now. Please hold. >> Now, what are you selling? >> Oh, my gosh. >> Hi, thank you so much for holding on the line. My name is Sam Wilson with Medicare Benefits. So, on a regarded line, how are you doing today? >> I'm doing just fine. What are you selling? >> Well, men, this call is about the Medicare credit benefits and saving options. Do you have the Medicare Part A and be both active? >> Yes, I do. >> May we already have the Medicare Part A and be both? The good news is that my peers will get qualified for some of the additional benefits. >> What do you get somebody on the line that can speak English?
